hyperedges.label: Streaming AI Response Flow: useChat -> API Route -> streamText -> toDataStreamResponse
UI Primitive Wrapper Pattern: Base UI + CVA variants + cn utility
Widget System Stub Cluster: parser + types + renderer + widget components

nodes.label: Widget Protocol
nodes.rationale: Structured JSON config emitted by LLM, decoded by Visual Response Engine, enables type-safe routing to interactive React components — avoids ad-hoc parsing and makes the system extensible to N widget types

nodes.label: Next.js 14 App Router
nodes.rationale: Chosen because it supports server components and modern routing conventions, enabling learning of Next.js patterns beyond the basic Pages Router

nodes.label: Discriminated Union Widget Types
nodes.rationale: Discriminated unions provide compile-time exhaustiveness checking so TypeScript catches missing widget type handlers at build time rather than runtime

nodes.label: Registry Pattern for Widget Routing
nodes.rationale: Maps string widget type keys to React components at runtime; chosen over if/else chains because it scales to N widgets without growing complexity, and TypeScript Record type enforces completeness

nodes.label: use client Directive Rationale
nodes.rationale: useChat requires use client because it maintains reactive state and interfaces with browser APIs (SSE DOM), which Server Components cannot access as they execute entirely server-side
